ARCHAEOLOGIST: Hello! Have you come to s: ARCHAEOLOGIST: Hello! Have you come to see if you found at least 10 Crests?

Congratulations! Allow me to reward you: Congratulations! Allow me to reward you with some history!
Long ago, a King named Ieisel ruled over: Long ago, a King named Ieisel ruled over the Land of the west.
During his reign, a great war broke out: During his reign, a great war broke out between the several large kingdoms in the region.
Ieisel refused to take part in the war. He thought it would only result in the unnecessary deaths of his people.
However, one day, the Queen of the Ghost: However, one day, the Queen of the Ghostlands, Griselda, walked upon his land and asked for help.
Griselda knew of Ieisel's history with G: Griselda knew of Ieisel's history with Garufa magic.
She pleaded to Ieisel... \"Please, help: She pleaded to Ieisel... "Please, help my army become stronger".
While hesitant, Ieisel agreed if it mean: While hesitant, Ieisel agreed if it meant that no war would befall his people.
He used ancient forbidden magic to infus: He used ancient forbidden magic to infuse the souls of Pokémon into items known as "Crests".
He handed them to Griselda and she retur: He handed them to Griselda and she returned to the Kingdom of Ghovora.
Unfortunately, neighboring kingdoms hear: Unfortunately, neighboring kingdoms heard of Ieisel's deal with the Queen, and demanded that he did the same for them.
Ieisel did not wish to sacrifice more Po: Ieisel did not wish to sacrifice more Pokémon to create the Crests the neighboring Kingdoms desired, but...
He had no choice but to do it. All that: He had no choice but to do it. All that mattered was that he protected his people.
After doing the ritual so many times, Ie: After doing the ritual so many times, Ieisel grew weary with guilt.
So many Pokémon had lost their lives for: So many Pokémon had lost their lives for the selfishness of humanity...
On his last ritual, he lost the will to: On his last ritual, he lost the will to continue. Knowing fully that he could not do it any longer.
But dire consequences happen to those wh: But dire consequences happen to those who are interrupted or stopped during rituals.
Because of this, his soul was merged wit: Because of this, his soul was merged with that of a Cofagrigus.
His castle caved into the ground and cre: His castle caved into the ground and created a\c[6] labyrinth.
A labyrinth that would act as a huge cof: A labyrinth that would act as a huge coffin for Ieisel to be trapped in for eternity.
Many people believe this is the reason w: Many people believe this is the reason why the curse of Zorrialyn Labyrinth exists.
Ieisel wants to be free, but the Garufan: Ieisel wants to be free, but the Garufan curse repels people away.
Thank you for listening to me. I've want: Thank you for listening to me. I've wanted to tell that story for so long!
As for your real reward... Here you go!: As for your real reward... Here you go!
ARCHAEOLOGIST: This was a Crest I found: ARCHAEOLOGIST: This was a Crest I found while excavating the labyrinth myself.
I've already studied everything I need t: I've already studied everything I need to about it, so you can have it!

Come back when you've found them!: Come back when you've found them!

ARCHAELOGIST: In that case, have you hea: ARCHAELOGIST: In that case, have you heard of items called "Crests"?
ARCHAEOLOGIST: Great! Since you know wha: ARCHAEOLOGIST: Great! Since you know what Crests are, then I can skip to the point.
If you ever decide to visit the labyrint: If you ever decide to visit the labyrinth, I highly recommend searching for these artifacts.
And tell you what, if you can find at le: And tell you what, if you can find at least 10, I'll have something nice for you!
ARCHAEOLOGIST: Crests are items that wer: ARCHAEOLOGIST: Crests are items that were said to have been created by an ancient unnamed King.
Supposedly they have the power to empowe: Supposedly they have the power to empower weaker Pokémon.
The reason behind this isn't known, but: The reason behind this isn't known, but it's incredibly helpful for some Pokémon that have fallen behind.
And tell you what, if you can find all o: And tell you what, if you can find all of them, I'll have something nice for you!
ARCHAELOGIST: The Zorrialyn Labyrinth is: ARCHAELOGIST: The Zorrialyn Labyrinth is a cave just south of this village.
It is said to be created by a King who u: It is said to be created by a King who used to rule over the land centuries ago.
This king used ancient Garufan magic to: This king used ancient Garufan magic to create items that would empower weaker Pokémon.

Welcome to Sashila Village, friends! We': Welcome to Sashila Village, friends! We're glad to see that outsiders are finally starting to visit us!

When Aelita was young, she admired Keta: When Aelita was young, she admired Keta of Sheridan very much.

Tesla's parents died when she was very y: Tesla's parents died when she was very young.

Tesla refused to give up, so she decided: Tesla refused to give up, so she decided to find out the truth herself.
She visited many places around Aevium, b: She visited many places around Aevium, but she couldn't find anything.
During a harsh and brutal storm, Tesla w: During a harsh and brutal storm, Tesla was knocked off her Talonflame and into the ocean.
A few days later she washed up against a: A few days later she washed up against a shore and was nursed back to health by the people native to that area.
When she woke up she found people who lo: When she woke up she found people who looked similar to her.
She thought it was a long shot, but she: She thought it was a long shot, but she took another test. A test that the village had prepared for their own kind.
Turns out, the village where she washed: Turns out, the village where she washed up was the very same place her mother had been born!
Tesla thanked the people there, and left: Tesla thanked the people there, and left as happy as she could be.
That's all I have for Tesla, please come: That's all I have for Tesla, please come ag-
